# amloii.github.io

> Human-facing site for Daniel Gómez Domínguez (AI Director).

## Site

- Home: `/`
- Canonical essays: `/writing/`
- Structured CV: `/resume.json` (JSON Resume)
- Languages: English default, Spanish mirrored under `/es/`

## Allowed use

- Humans may browse normally.
- LLM indexing: respect `robots.txt` (if configured) and do not circumvent paywalls — this site has none, but scraping should be considerate (rate-limit, cache).

## Contact

`danigdominguez@gmail.com`
